# Olympia Governance — CoreDAO for Ethereum Classic

## About

Olympia Governance is the CoreDAO governance application for Ethereum Classic (ETC). It provides a web interface for browsing proposals, submitting ECFPs (Ethereum Classic Funding Proposals), voting, managing treasury funds, and administering soulbound member NFTs.

## Key Features

- Proposal browsing and creation (ECIP-1113 OlympiaGovernor)
- ECFP submission and tracking (ECIP-1114 ECFPRegistry)
- On-chain voting with soulbound NFT membership
- Treasury monitoring and withdrawal proposals (ECIP-1112)
- Sanctions compliance checking (ECIP-1119 SanctionsOracle)
- Timelock-controlled execution

## Technology

- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- React 19, TypeScript 5
- wagmi 2 + viem (Ethereum Classic interaction)
- Tailwind CSS 4

## Network

- Mordor Testnet (Chain ID 63)
- Demo v0.1

## Links

- DAO: https://olympiadao.org
- Treasury: https://olympiatreasury.org
- App: https://core.olympiadao.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/olympiadao
